danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: If you delete your account, all your data will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
danger.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
danger.requestedMessage: Your account deletion request has been received. It will be processed as soon as possible.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.saveSuccessMessage: Your notification preferences have been updated.
notifications.saveErrorMessage: Preferences could not be saved. Please try again.

newReviews.label: New reviews
newReviews.description: When your businesses receive a new review

factVerifications.label: Fact verifications
factVerifications.description: When facts you shared are verified

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.saveSuccessMessage: Your privacy preferences have been updated.
privacy.saveErrorMessage: Preferences could not be saved. Please try again.
privacy.info: Your email address is never shared on Bilinç. All your contributions appear under your username.

publicProfile.label: Make my profile public
publicProfile.description: Your profile and reviews will be visible to everyone

showLocationInReviews.label: Show my location in reviews
showLocationInReviews.description: Your location will be shown on the reviews you write

hideActivityHistory.label: Hide my activity history
hideActivityHistory.description: Other users cannot see your activity history
